chunks.text: IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD C.P.No.D- 502 of 2016 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For orders on office objections 2. For katcha Peshi 21.02.2018. Mr. Ghulamullah Chang Advocate for the petitioner Mr. Jangu Khan Special Prosecutor NAB -=-=- It is stated by learned counsel for the petitioner that name of petitioner does not appear in the NAB reference, therefore, on the instructions of petitioner, counsel for petitioner does not press this constitutional petition which is dismissed as not pressed alongwith listed application. Learned counsel for the petitioner has prayed that surety amount which has been deposited by the surety in terms of order dated 15.03.2016 may be returned to him. Learned Special Prosecutor NAB has raised no objection. Therefore, office is directed to only return the surety amount to the surety after proper verification and identification. JUDGE JUDGE A.Rasheed/steno
